text:
Didier.Boivin@clarins.fr disait :
> >Description:
> I have problem to send mail to an SMTP system which runs in 7 bits mode
> I tried to use different options in the sendmail command, 
> like sendmail -B7BIT or sendmail -8BITMIME without any effect

A bit more details please. What is you .mc file ? What error message are
you getting (if any) ? How does the mail look like ?
--
